intent: zero/stub output implementation copied from starter must not satisfy hidden behavior checker

why_wrong: Requires vin to exceed 0.60 V before updating the held peak, missing a valid 0.55 V public peak while retaining reset behavior.
Scales the peak output low while leaving sampling and reset structure intact.
Clears the held peak when reset is low instead of when reset is high.
Uses a 5 ns output transition instead of the declared tr, so reset/peak settling misses the checker window.
Introduces a transient downward notch while the held peak must remain monotonic.
Uses an effectively instantaneous output transition instead of the required smoothed transition.
